## Meeting Purpose

[To align the team on client priorities and roles for the week.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Fatima now owns article generation for Otto & Relay.** Rachel will provide collaborative support on artifact updates, not editing, to improve pipeline quality.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Top priority: Fix poor agentic pipeline output.** The root cause is artifacts written for brevity, which produce choppy sentences and factual errors (e.g., Otto's AI inventing features).](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Kelvin will first deliver last week's content,** then update handoff docs. Fatima will generate 1–2 articles per client for Bailey to review, providing immediate feedback for artifact improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Poor Agentic Pipeline Output

  - [The recent shift to the agentic pipeline for Otto & Relay has degraded article quality, creating significant post-processing work.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Artifacts are written for brevity, not natural language. This produces choppy sentences and poor transitions in the final articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Key Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [**Factual Errors (Otto):** The AI invents non-existent product features, requiring a manual fact-checking step.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Tone Mismatch (Relay):** The AI overuses conversational examples ("7 a.m. and your app is uploaded...") without providing context, resulting in "all tone, no substance."](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
      - [**Irrelevant Internal Links:** Links often go to "mindshare competitors" (articles targeting the same keywords) or are contextually wrong.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
          - [**Fix:** Restrict the pipeline's link-target URL to the client's blog (e.g., `auto.com/resources/blog`) and add an explicit "do not link to anything but this" instruction.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

### Solution: Collaborative Artifact Updates

  - [**Rationale:** Improving artifact quality is the most effective way to fix the pipeline's output and reduce manual editing.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [**Process:** Fatima and Rachel will collaborate on artifact updates early this week.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Why:** Collaboration ensures a shared understanding of the process, which is more beneficial for long-term ownership than Rachel simply editing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Action:** Fatima will create a copy of the pipeline to safely test changes.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Guidance:** Review the Notion meeting with Hassan, who confirmed that artifacts written in the client's actual voice and tone dramatically improve output quality.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### Client Context & Priorities

  - [**Otto:** AI travel assistant for business travelers.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [**Content Focus:** A new product with a large runway of approved topics.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [**Priority:** Fact-checking all product features and links.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Relay:** Banking platform for small businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [**Content Focus:** Home services accounting and "AI for small businesses" (to own this niche).](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**New Project:** Bailey is researching a new "accounting and bookkeeping" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**Action:** Fatima will conduct keyword research and generate assignments for this new cluster once Bailey provides seed keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### Team Roles & Weekly Plan

  - [**Kelvin:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Priority 1:** Deliver all outstanding content from last week.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Priority 2:** Update the handoff documents in Notion to reflect current agentic pipeline processes.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Fatima:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Priority 1:** Collaborate with Rachel on artifact updates.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Priority 2:** Generate 1–2 articles per client for Bailey's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Priority 3:** Conduct keyword research for Relay's new cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Priority 1:** Collaborate with Fatima on artifact updates.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is feasible due to lighter workloads for Logic (paused Mon/Tues) and Hyper-Exponential (calibration articles only).](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Priority 1:** Provide feedback on Fatima's initial articles to guide artifact improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Priority 2:** Provide seed keywords to Fatima for Relay's new cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fatima & Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
      - [Schedule a collaborative session early this week to update Otto & Relay artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [**Fatima:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [Generate 1–2 articles per client for Bailey's review.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for Relay's new cluster upon receiving seed keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [**Kelvin:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [Deliver last week's outstanding content.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [Update the Notion handoff documents.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [Provide feedback on Fatima's initial articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [Provide seed keywords to Fatima for Relay's new cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/ob1jhWndLEYA3MbZHeuk38ndZePKAS2-?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
